text: Being here, I am quietly alert and reflective. The clean, modern architecture and well-lit corridors exude a sense of order and purpose, yet the emptiness and stillness provoke a subtle unease. Entering the exhibition space, I notice the vibrant wall of ideas—a celebration of research and development. Surrounded by innovation, I feel both inspired and small, slightly disconnected from the purposeful hum that such places usually contain. Is this a place where one is meant to observe, or to participate? The uncertainty lingers with me, inviting inquiry.
